name: sisyphus-the-czar
description: Совместная интерактивная веб-миниатюра с одним камнем

scripts.dev:server: cross-env PORT=8081 DEBUG=true nodemon --legacy-watch --watch server --watch shared --ext js --exec node server/index.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:server: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/session-manager.js && node --check server/session-store.js && node --check shared/physics.js
scripts.test: node --test tests/unit/physics.test.js tests/unit/session-manager.test.js tests/unit/session-store.test.js tests/unit/server.test.js tests/unit/frontend-model.test.mjs tests/integration/realtime.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test && npm run test:smoke
